Demand for Compute Is Soaring (Total Tokens Consumed per Week, Billions)
AI compute demand grew +4,274% in under one year — from 53B tokens/week in June 2024 to 2,318B tokens/week by May 2025. This exponential trajectory is the primary driver of accelerating data center construction and investment across the United States.
Source: OpenRouter as of May 26, 2025  |  As cited in Goldman Sachs Investment Banking, Powering the AI Era, 2025
Data Center Evolution: Power Density by Generation
AI workloads require exponentially more power per rack than traditional cloud infrastructure. By 2027, AI server racks will require 50x more power than cloud equivalents from five years ago.
Cloud Data Center 1.0
5–15 kW
Per Rack
CPUs  |  Air Cooling
Retrofit AI Data Center
~40 kW
Per Rack
8 GPUs  |  Air Cooling
Transitional AI Data Center
130–200 kW
Per Rack
144 GPUs  |  Liquid & Air Cooling
“AI Factory” Data Center
500+ kW
Per Rack
576 GPUs  |  Liquid Cooling
Source: Nvidia 2025 GTC Keynote Presentation  |  As cited in Goldman Sachs Investment Banking, Powering the AI Era, 2025
Key Market Context — Goldman Sachs Research
3%
Data center vacancy rate (record low)
Near 0% in most sought-after US markets. New power at scale often not available until 2028 or beyond.
50M+ sqft
Total US data center development footprint
Double the volume of five years ago. Demand is rapidly outstripping supply.
$12B
Average cost to bring a 250 MW AI data center online
Inclusive of all equipment inside. Compute hardware costs 3–4x more than the physical building itself.
$1T
Projected hyperscaler AI investment by 2027
AI spending is not cannibalizing cloud budgets — it is expanding them.
+160%
Data center power demand growth by 2030 (vs. 2023)
Equivalent to adding another top-10 power-consuming country to the global grid.
$5T
Total funding required for digital infrastructure & power
Comparable in scale to the railroad, electrification, and dot-com buildouts combined.
Source: Goldman Sachs Investment Banking, Powering the AI Era, 2025  |  Goldman Sachs Research, Data Center Power Demand: The 6 Ps, Nov 2025
